news.title: Markets Today: Sensex Jumps 650 Points, Nifty Tops 24,100 At Open; IT Index Surges Over 3% After TCS Earnings
news.summary: The Indian market opens sharply higher on Friday, tracking strong global cues and a rally in IT stocks after Tata Consultancy Services reported its June 2026 quarter earnings.

news.title: Kusumgar IPO Day 3: Issue subscribed 13.13x so far. GMP hints 38% listing pop. Apply or not?
news.summary: The Kusumgar IPO, open from July 8 to July 10, raised ₹193.9 crore from anchor investors and features a lot size of 35 shares. It has a subscription status of 13.13x, with strong interest from QIBs and NIIs. Listing is scheduled for July 15.

news.title: Dixon Technologies share price jumps 3% after govt clears Vivo India JV; should you buy the stock?
news.summary: Analysts expect this joint venture to enhance the Dixon Technologies’ manufacturing capabilities and strengthen its market share and positioning in the Android smartphone market in India.

news.title: TCS share price jumps 4% after Q1 results 2026: Should you buy, sell or hold the IT stock post earnings?
news.summary: TCS posted a Q1FY27 net profit of ₹13,349 crore, up 5% YoY but down 3% QoQ. Revenue rose 14% YoY to ₹72,275 crore. Despite pressure, shares increased after the results, reflecting confidence in recovery and AI-driven growth.

news.title: Switched jobs recently? EPFO's new rule can make your PF transfer hassle-free
news.summary: EPFO has removed the need for a separate provident fund transfer request when employees with Aadhaar-linked UANs change jobs. The move is part of a wider overhaul of the EPFO's digital platform aimed at making PF services faster and simpler.

news.title: Gold price falls, silver trades flat on MCX amid increased US Fed rate-hike bets
news.summary: MCX gold August delivery was 0.27% down at ₹1,44,913 per 10 grams, while MCX silver September contracts were 0.08% up at ₹2,26,555 per kg around 9:15 am.

news.title: Nithin Kamath explains difference between ‘direct’ and ‘regular’ mutual funds, urges investors to review plans
news.summary: Zerodha co-founder Nithin Kamath has asked investors to understand the difference between ‘direct’ and ‘regular’ mutual fund plans. He said many investors remain unaware of the higher costs associated with regular plans and advised reviewing their portfolios to identify their existing investments.

Their demands, raised during stakeholder consultations, could shape future salary, pension and allowance reforms for 1.1 crore Central government employees and pensioners.

IRFC.institutional_activity: Institutional investors oversubscribed the IRFC Offer for Sale (OFS) by more than 1.5 times, leading the government to exercise its greenshoe option. This indicates robust demand from institutional buyers for the shares.
IRFC.order_book_block_deals: IRFC shares experienced a 5% decline as the Offer for Sale (OFS) commenced for non-retail investors.
IRFC.future_expansion_capex: IRFC intends to raise a $2 billion External Commercial Borrowing (ECB) loan specifically to finance large infrastructure projects. This significant funding initiative points towards substantial future capital expenditure and project development.
IRFC.new_orders_contracts: The company is set to raise $2 billion via an ECB loan to finance large infrastructure projects, indicating future involvement in new project funding and potential contract awards.

NETWEB.institutional_activity: Netweb's IPO was significantly oversubscribed, with the Qualified Institutional Buyer (QIB) portion subscribed 228.91 times and non-institutional investors 81.81 times, indicating strong institutional demand.
NETWEB.future_expansion_capex: Netweb Technologies announced a collaboration with Vertiv to jointly develop and validate GPU-based AI infrastructure solutions. The company also partnered with Nvidia to become a manufacturing partner for Nvidia Grace CPU Superchip and GH200 Grace Hopper Superchip MGX server designs in India.
NETWEB.new_orders_contracts: Netweb Technologies announced a collaboration with Vertiv for developing GPU-based AI infrastructure solutions and partnered with Nvidia to manufacture Grace CPU Superchip and GH200 Grace Hopper Superchip MGX server designs in India.
NETWEB.earnings_results: Netweb Technologies reported a strong Q1 performance with profit after tax more than doubling year-on-year to Rs 30.5 crore and operating income surging 102% to Rs 301.2 crore. Operating EBITDA jumped 127.2% to Rs 44.8 crore, reflecting a healthy margin of 14.9%, with PAT margin at 10.1%. The company also received a ratings upgrade by CRISIL to A+ Stable, with expectations of sustained revenue growth and steady operating margins.
NETWEB.summary_headline: Netweb Technologies reports strong Q1 earnings, secures key AI/GPU partnerships with Nvidia and Vertiv, and receives a ratings upgrade, leading to a significant stock rally.
